explanation: This command uses an obfuscated octal IP address in the URL. The Sigma rule should detect this as a match because it contains an encoded IP address format.

This command uses an obfuscated hexadecimal IP address in the URL. The Sigma rule should detect this as a match because it contains an encoded IP address format.
This command uses a single obfuscated decimal IP address in the URL. The Sigma rule should detect this as a match because it contains an encoded IP address format.
